reviews.review_description:
The heavenly blissful Sunday vibes are through the roof! Even though I'm on a budget. I got this app. This app + Sunday afternoons and evenings = heaven. An intense visceral searing level of Sunday vibes. Any day of the week is good as well.
Kennecott Mines reminds of Hedley BC mines. 19th century architectural splendour.
This is a very beautiful app.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice review! I am happy, that my app had such a meditating effect on you ;) If you want to, you can try the other apps as well, there is a Bundle from them, where Alaska is not in it yet, so you can save some money.

reviews.review_description: My son and I both did the entire tour, and really enjoyed it.  My son has returned to the app several times, hopping between his favorite locations.  The views are amazing, and the scenery is beautiful.  While each viewpoint is stationary, it is 360, and there are multiple viewpoints at each location, so you can really look around, and it's pretty immersive.   The documentary tour was really interesting and quite lengthy, and I was surprised how much content there was!    This was our first "visit" app, but we'll definitely be getting others.

developer_response.body:
Hi!
Thank you very much for your review! I am really glad, that even the younger generation likes the app. If you want to save some money, there is a bundle of the other apps available, which can save you about 1 app worth of money. Enjoy your visit to other places!

reviews.review_description: I just tried the app, and it was like traveling to another country, despite being in my cozy room! The app also allow you to select multiple languages, so you can enjoy the experience in your native language, and you can jump into multiple locations. I've never been to Alaska and it was interesting to see how it really looks like

Once again NP software have come up trumps 
The attention to detail is excellent 
The locations are stunning and very immersive 
I even shivered when I came off the glacier 
The locations truly draw you in and I forgot the number of times I said wow 
These Visit apps are truly awesome 
I highly recommend you try them and the automatic moving from one location to the next is very much appreciated as I am elderly and disabled and not having to use the controllers is an unexpected bonus 
Thanks again Peter you are amazing 
I can't wait for your next adventure 
How about The Grand Canyon that would be amazing 
Thanks again I wish I could leave more than a five star review as this app deserves more

developer_response.body:
Hi!
Thank you very much Jimbo! You are my dedicated follower :) I am trying to do my best. Currently I am working again on Madeira! It needs to be updated to the same version as all my other apps (already done) and I received quite a lot 360 Pictures from all over the island. They are not 3D, but they are in an impressive 200MP quality shot with a professional camera. I will implement those and give the as a free update ;) Also I am going to Portugal -> Algarve on the 24th of December, will try to film there everything again! So Visit Portugal will  be as next.. So stay tuned and thanks again for your enthusiastic review! It is something that keeps me going!

reviews.review_title: I am a big Fan of this Series!
reviews.review_description: I bought all parts, because of the Videos from ShaorinVR! My MQ3 is now my airplane! ❤️

developer_response.body: ShaorinVR is the best. She is really creative and original. I am glad you liked my apps. I am adding new content to madeira in a few weeks and this week filming in Algarve Portugal. So there will be a new app as well ;) thanks again!

reviews.review_description: I watched the whole of Alaska. Very interesting documentary, beautiful nature, nicely done. Plus I liked the boat trip and the iceberg. Really great work! I'm already looking forward to a new and interesting expedition!
